title: Rainy Night Emotional Movie Poster AI
sourceTitle: Rainy Night Emotional Movie Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Rainy-night emotional cinematic movie poster featuring adult figure holding a black umbrella in quiet rain-soaked city street with streetlamp reflections, with headline 不是每场雨，都需要躲开。 and subtitle AFTER THE RAIN. Subject: adult figure holding a black umbrella stands quietly with an umbrella, small in the lower-right area, surrounded by wet pavement reflections, streetlight glow, and restrained solitude. Scene: quiet rain-soaked city street with streetlamp reflections with rain, night street depth, reflective ground, cold white lamps, deep blue-gray atmosphere, and a quiet Asian movie-poster emotional tone. Composition: Fixed 4:5 cinematic poster layout: large empty text-friendly space on the left, main figure placed in the lower right, wet street reflection leading into depth, and minimal typography integrated into the air. Signature Elements: adult figure holding a black umbrella, quiet rain-soaked city street with streetlamp reflections, umbrella, rainy night street, wet reflective ground, left-side negative space, lower-right figure placement, 不是每场雨，都需要躲开。, and AFTER THE RAIN. Style: Emotional cinematic poster, rainy night photography, Asian movie aesthetic, advanced mood lighting, film grain, low-saturation restraint, and quiet poetic realism. Color Palette: Deep blue, gray black, cold white light, low-saturation wet asphalt tones, tiny warm reflections, and muted filmic contrast. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Wide environmental movie-still framing with the person small against the night street, strong negative space, and cinematic depth. Typography: 不是每场雨，都需要躲开。 appears as the minimalist Chinese movie-poster line; AFTER THE RAIN appears as a small subtitle in restrained cinematic type, both readable and quiet. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
